name: bidsapps

metadata.name: bidsapps
metadata.summary: CLI tool for running BIDS apps

documentation:
# 🧠 BIDS Apps CLI 🚀

Manage and run your **BIDS apps** with ease! This tool is designed to streamline running multiple BIDS apps on your BIDS datasets, 
whether the apps are containerized BIDS apps, or SnakeBIDS apps that use containers for different rules of the workflow. 

### ✨ Features:
- 📂 **Organize and manage** your BIDS apps configuration with a central repository.
- 🏃 **Run BIDS apps** seamlessly from the command line, passing custom arguments.
- 🖥️ **SnakeBIDS batching** runs any BIDS App using a snakemake/snakebids wrapper with parallelization. 
- 📦 **Zip outputs** and run in isolated temp directories for HPC systems, including smart merging of participant zipfiles.
- 🔍 **Discover new apps** from the [BIDS Apps Registry](https://bids-apps.neuroimaging.io/).


---

## Installation

To install the CLI, clone the repository and install the dependencies:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/khanlab/bidsapps
cd bidsapps
pip install -e .
```

## Usage

Below is the latest CLI usage:

```
Usage: bidsapps [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  CLI tool for managing BIDS apps repository.

Options:
  --help  Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  add                Add a new app to the repository.
  configure          Configure the repository.
  edit               Edit an existing app interactively.
  import             Commands for importing BIDS apps.
  list
  pull               Pull the latest changes from the repository.
  run                Run a specified BIDS app with the given arguments.
  show-repo          Show the currently configured repository.
  update-manifest
  validate-manifest
```

functions.name: bidsapps.repo_management.configure_repo
documentation: Configure the repository, supporting both local paths and GitHub URIs.

functions.name: bidsapps.repo_management.get_repo
documentation: Retrieve the currently configured repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.app_management.add_app
documentation: Add a new app to the repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.manifest_management.load_manifest
documentation: Load the manifest from the configured repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.manifest_management.list_apps
documentation: List apps from the manifest with pretty output using Rich.

functions.name: bidsapps.manifest_management.update_manifest
documentation: Update the manifest based on the current apps.

functions.name: bidsapps.manifest_management.validate_manifest
documentation: Validate the manifest against the apps directory.

functions.name: bidsapps.manifest_management.auto_update_and_validate_manifest
documentation: Automatically update and validate the manifest whenever app configurations change.

functions.name: bidsapps.app_import.fetch_bids_apps
documentation: Fetch the BIDS apps YAML from the BIDS website repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.app_import.list_bids_apps
documentation: Display a table of all BIDS apps.

functions.name: bidsapps.app_import.fetch_docker_tags
documentation: Fetch available Docker tags for a given repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.app_import.import_new_bids_app
documentation: Interactive process to import a new BIDS app.

functions.name: bidsapps.query_configs.load_manifest
documentation: Load manifest.json from the repository

functions.name: bidsapps.query_configs.load_app_config
documentation: Load a specific app configuration

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.cli
documentation: CLI tool for managing BIDS apps repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.run_app
documentation:
Run a specified BIDS app with the given arguments.

 
BIDS_DIR: Path to the BIDS directory.
OUTPUT_DIR: Path to the output directory.
APP_NAME: Name of the BIDS app to run.
OPTIONAL_ARGS: Additional arguments to pass to the app's CLI.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.configure
documentation: Configure the repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.show_repo
documentation: Show the currently configured repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.add
documentation: Add a new app to the repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.edit
documentation: Edit an existing app interactively.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.pull
documentation: Pull the latest changes from the repository.

functions.name: bidsapps.cli.import_cmd
documentation: Commands for importing BIDS apps.

functions.name: bidsapps.interactive_edit.interactive_edit_yaml
documentation: Interactive editor for a YAML file with support for dicts and lists.
